args.text: CO-50 medical necessity denial on CLM-2025-00016 for Dorothy Harris. Claim includes GI endoscopic services (43235, 43239) and J1100 with diagnosis of GERD w/ esophagitis (K21.0) and hiatal hernia (K44.9). Based on available information, this is a clinical coverage/medical necessity issue and should be reviewed by clinical appeals for possible appeal rather than coded/written off. No additional documentation is visible here to overturn the denial automatically.

Based on available information, this is a clinical coverage/medical necessity issue and should be reviewed by clinical appeals for possible appeal rather than coded/written off. No additional documentation is visible here to overturn the denial automatically.

args.text: CO-50 denial on CLM-2025-00016 for Dorothy Harris is a medical necessity denial. Services include GI endoscopic procedures (43235, 43239, J1100) billed with diagnoses K21.0 GERD with esophagitis and K44.9 hiatal hernia. Based on the available remittance/claim details, this is a clinical coverage issue rather than a coding or billing correction. Appropriate triage disposition: Route to Clinical Appeals for review and possible appeal.

args.text: CO-50 denial on CLM-2025-00016 for Dorothy Harris. The claim denied as non-covered/not medically necessary for GI procedures 43235, 43239, and J1100. Available documentation shows GERD with esophagitis (K21.0) and hiatal hernia (K44.9); this is a clinical medical-necessity issue rather than a coding or billing error. Appropriate triage disposition: Route to Clinical Appeals for review and possible appeal.
